title: Medical prior authorization: PDF ping-pong nightmare
persona: RCM / prior-auth specialist at hospital or practice
pain_description: PA request → payer portal/fax → payer asks for clinical notes → provider office faxes → payer denies → appeal. Weeks of delay; care delayed; burnout.
incumbent_gap: Portal aggregators; not agentic drafters + appellate
santifer_pattern: EHR pull + payer-rule RAG + auto PA submission + denial-appeal drafter
why_now: $740B healthcare admin spend; payer APIs slowly opening

title: Medical claims denial management
persona: RCM team at physician group / hospital
pain_description: 15-30% claims denied; team re-works top denials; smaller dollar denials written off. Millions lost.
incumbent_gap: Bulk billing tools; denials handled human
santifer_pattern: Denial ingest + root-cause classifier + appeal drafter + resubmission agent

title: Physician documentation: burnout from SOAP notes
pain_description: 2 hrs charting per 8 hrs patient time; pajama-time documentation = burnout; quality suffers.
incumbent_gap: Crowded space but specialty variants underserved
santifer_pattern: Ambient audio + specialty-specific note agent + ICD/CPT + EHR push

title: Insurance verification + eligibility check at front desk
persona: Front office staff at clinic / dental / PT
pain_description: Each patient: call payer or use portal to verify benefits, copay, deductible. 10+ min per patient.
incumbent_gap: API-based but require integration; agentic flow missing
santifer_pattern: Patient intake + insurance photo + auto-eligibility + benefit synthesis agent

title: Patient recall + no-show prevention
persona: Practice manager at clinic / dental / PT
pain_description: Patients miss appointments 20%+; recall for preventive care weak; revenue leaks.
santifer_pattern: Per-patient voice/SMS agent + reschedule flow + wait-list fill

title: Dental office: insurance + recall + intake fragmented
pain_description: Dentrix/Open Dental + Weave + Dental Intel + spreadsheet. Insurance verify separate; recall separate.
santifer_pattern: Single SSOT for patients + insurance + recall + AI agent for all comms

title: Veterinary clinic: multi-species EHR + reminders
pain_description: Species-specific records, drug dosing, rabies compliance, grooming appointments — generic EMRs force workarounds.
santifer_pattern: Airtable EMR + species drug-DB + WhatsApp recall + insurance claim agent

title: Chiropractic practice: insurance + SOAP + recall
pain_description: Insurance pre-auth for ongoing visits; manual SOAP notes; recall to drive retention.
santifer_pattern: Ambient SOAP agent + visit-cadence recall + insurance pre-auth agent

title: Physical therapy practice: prior auth per visit block
pain_description: Medicare/payer caps on visits; re-auth required every 10 visits; admin burden huge.
santifer_pattern: Visit counter + pre-auth trigger + PA drafter from notes

title: Mental health private practice: insurance + intake + measurement-based care
pain_description: Insurance credentialing, intake forms, PHQ-9/GAD-7 scoring, telehealth — across 4 tools.
santifer_pattern: Intake agent + measurement scoring + insurance + telehealth + note drafter

title: Home health agency: scheduling + route + OASIS
pain_description: Caregiver matching, route optimization, OASIS documentation, Medicare compliance — tangled.
santifer_pattern: Caregiver skill + geo match + OASIS drafter + Medicare compliance agent

title: Medical device inventory + consignment tracking in OR
pain_description: Consignment implants, expiry, rep-managed inventory, case reconciliation — all manual.
santifer_pattern: Barcode scan + case reconciliation + expiry monitor + rep-comms agent

title: Pharmacy: controlled substance tracking + DEA reporting
pain_description: C-II inventory counts, DEA 222, SUPPORT Act — errors lead to suspension.
santifer_pattern: Perpetual inventory + CII ledger + DEA report agent + audit pack

title: Clinical trial patient matching + recruitment
pain_description: Patient eligibility criteria complex; matching through EHR + patient interview; trials miss enrollment.
incumbent_gap: EHR access hard; patient-agent interface thin
santifer_pattern: EHR RAG + eligibility reasoning + patient WhatsApp/voice consent + site booking

title: Medical coding review (HCC / MS-DRG)
pain_description: Coder reads chart for HCC codes; missed codes = lost risk adjustment revenue (millions per payer).
santifer_pattern: Chart ingest + HCC/DRG codes extractor + coder-review workflow

title: Nursing home: MDS reporting + staffing
pain_description: Minimum Data Set (MDS) assessments drive Medicare reimbursement; state staffing rules; surveys terrify.
santifer_pattern: Clinical data + MDS drafter agent + survey-prep + staffing compliance monitor

title: Revenue cycle for rural / FQHC clinics
pain_description: Sliding-fee, Medicaid MCO mix, wraparound payments — unique rules; generic RCM fails.
santifer_pattern: Payer-rule engine for FQHC + sliding-fee calc + wraparound tracker

title: Telehealth: pre-visit prep + follow-up
pain_description: Patient shows up unprepared; visits short; follow-up care falls through.
santifer_pattern: Pre-visit agent collects HPI + vitals + reason + schedules follow-up

title: Medspa / aesthetics practice: consult → treatment plan → financing
pain_description: Consult notes + photos + treatment plan + Cherry/CareCredit financing + retention all in separate tools.
santifer_pattern: Consult AI + treatment plan doc + financing + retention agent

title: ASC (ambulatory surgery center) scheduling + coding
pain_description: Case scheduling, materials, implants, coding, billing - across 5 tools; leakage huge.
santifer_pattern: Case SSOT + implant tracker + coder-AI + billing agent
